f2lCanonicalSections.title: Free Pairs
f2lCanonicalSections.description: Canonical F2L cases where the pair pieces are free. Initial numbered cases from the 41-case F2L catalog.

cases.name: F2L 1
cases.alg: U R U' R'
cases.caseSetupAlg: F R' F' R
cases.note: Canonical Free Pairs case. Pair is free and inserts into the front-right slot.
cases.setup: F R' F' R

cases.name: F2L 2
cases.alg: F R' F' R
cases.caseSetupAlg: R' F R F'
cases.note: Canonical Free Pairs case. Alternate free-pair orientation with a short trigger solution.
cases.setup: R' F R F'

cases.name: F2L 3
cases.alg: F' U' F
cases.caseSetupAlg: F' U F
cases.note: Canonical Free Pairs case with a simple three-move insert from a free-pair setup.
cases.setup: F' U F

cases.name: F2L 4
cases.alg: R U R'
cases.caseSetupAlg: R U' R'
cases.note: Canonical Free Pairs case mirrored around the U/R trigger family.
cases.setup: R U' R'

f2lCanonicalSections.title: Disconnected Pairs
f2lCanonicalSections.description: Canonical F2L cases where corner and edge are separated. These require pairing before insertion.

cases.name: F2L 5
cases.alg: U' R U R' U2 R U' R'
cases.caseSetupAlg: R U R' U2 R U' R' U
cases.note: Disconnected pair case requiring a standard pair-then-insert sequence.
cases.setup: R U R' U2 R U' R' U

cases.name: F2L 6
cases.alg: U' r U' R' U R U r'
cases.caseSetupAlg: F' U' F U2 F' U F U'
cases.note: Disconnected pair with a common right-side pairing pattern.
cases.setup: F' U' F U2 F' U F U'

cases.name: F2L 7
cases.alg: U' R U2 R' U' R U2 R'
cases.caseSetupAlg: R U R' U2 R U2 R' U
cases.note: Disconnected pair case with repeated U2 rhythm before insertion.
cases.setup: R U R' U2 R U2 R' U

cases.name: F2L 8
cases.alg: d R' U2 R U R' U2 R
cases.caseSetupAlg: r' U' R2 U' R2 U2 r
cases.note: Disconnected pair case often solved with a wide-turn or d-layer pairing route.
cases.setup: r' U' R2 U' R2 U2 r

cases.name: F2L 9
cases.alg: U' R U' R' U F' U' F
cases.caseSetupAlg: F' U F U' R U R' U
cases.note: Disconnected pair with mixed R/U/F pairing before the insert.
cases.setup: F' U F U' R U R' U

cases.name: F2L 10
cases.alg: U' R U R' U R U R'
cases.caseSetupAlg: R U' R' U' R U' R' U
cases.note: Disconnected pair case using a repeated R/U insertion rhythm.
cases.setup: R U' R' U' R U' R' U

cases.name: F2L 19
cases.alg: U R U2 R' U R U' R'
cases.caseSetupAlg: R U R' U' R U2 R' U'
cases.note: Disconnected pair case with a U-adjust into a standard pair-then-insert flow.
cases.setup: R U R' U' R U2 R' U'

cases.name: F2L 20
cases.alg: y' U' R' U2 R U' R' U R
cases.caseSetupAlg: R U R' F R' F' R2 U R' U
cases.note: Disconnected pair case with a longer setup and a standard U2 pairing resolution.
cases.setup: R U R' F R' F' R2 U R' U

cases.name: F2L 21
cases.alg: U2 R U R' U R U' R'
cases.caseSetupAlg: R U' R' U2 R U R'
cases.note: Disconnected pair case with a U2 pre-alignment before pairing and insertion.
cases.setup: R U' R' U2 R U R'

cases.name: F2L 22
cases.alg: r U' r' U2 r U r'
cases.caseSetupAlg: F' L' U2 L F
cases.note: Disconnected pair case often solved with a compact wide-turn pairing sequence.
cases.setup: F' L' U2 L F

f2lCanonicalSections.title: Connected Pairs
f2lCanonicalSections.description: Canonical F2L cases where the corner-edge pair is already connected and must be inserted efficiently.

cases.name: F2L 11
cases.alg: U' R U2 R' U F' U' F
cases.caseSetupAlg: F' U F U' R U2 R' U
cases.note: Connected pair case that typically inserts after a short U adjustment.
cases.setup: F' U F U' R U2 R' U

cases.name: F2L 12
cases.alg: R U' R' U R U' R' U2 R U' R'
cases.caseSetupAlg: R U R' U2 R U R' U' R U R'
cases.note: Connected pair case with a longer U/R insertion sequence.
cases.setup: R U R' U2 R U R' U' R U R'

cases.name: F2L 13
cases.alg: y' U R' U R U' R' U' R
cases.caseSetupAlg: r U2 R' U R U' R' U M
cases.note: Connected pair case with a pre-built pair that inserts after a short U adjustment.
cases.setup: r U2 R' U R U' R' U M

cases.name: F2L 14
cases.alg: U' R U' R' U R U R'
cases.caseSetupAlg: R U' R' U' R U R' U
cases.note: Connected pair case using mirrored U turns before a standard insert rhythm.
cases.setup: R U' R' U' R U R' U

cases.name: F2L 15
cases.alg: R' D' R U' R' D R U R U' R'
cases.caseSetupAlg: R U R' U' R U R' U2 R U' R'
cases.note: Connected pair case often solved with a D-layer insert to preserve slot structure.
cases.setup: R U R' U' R U R' U2 R U' R'

cases.name: F2L 16
cases.alg: R U' R' U2 F' U' F
cases.caseSetupAlg: F' U F U2 R U R'
cases.note: Connected pair case with an F-trigger finish after a U2 alignment.
cases.setup: F' U F U2 R U R'

cases.name: F2L 17
cases.alg: R U2 R' U' R U R'
cases.caseSetupAlg: R U' R' U R U2 R'
cases.note: Connected pair case with a straightforward U2 insert pattern.
cases.setup: R U' R' U R U2 R'

cases.name: F2L 18
cases.alg: y' R' U2 R U R' U' R
cases.caseSetupAlg: R U R' U' R U R' F R' F' R
cases.note: Connected pair case where the pair is preserved and inserted after a U2 trigger.
cases.setup: R U R' U' R U R' F R' F' R

cases.name: F2L 23
cases.alg: U R U' R' U' R U' R' U R U' R'
cases.caseSetupAlg: R U' R' U R U' R' U2 R U' R'
cases.note: Connected pair case with a long U/R sequence to preserve orientation into insertion.
cases.setup: R U' R' U R U' R' U2 R U' R'

cases.name: F2L 24
cases.alg: F U R U' R' F' R U' R'
cases.caseSetupAlg: R U R' F R U R' U' F'
cases.note: Connected pair case solved with an F trigger sandwich before final insertion.
cases.setup: R U R' F R U R' U' F'

f2lCanonicalSections.title: Corner In Slot
f2lCanonicalSections.description: Canonical F2L cases where the corner is already in a slot and must be paired/extracted efficiently with the matching edge.

cases.name: F2L 25
cases.alg: U' R' F R F' R U R'
cases.caseSetupAlg: F' R U R' U' R' F R
cases.note: Corner-in-slot recovery case with an F/R pairing sequence before reinsertion.
cases.setup: F' R U R' U' R' F R

cases.name: F2L 26
cases.alg: U R U' R' F R' F' R
cases.caseSetupAlg: F' U' F U R U R' U'
cases.note: Corner-in-slot case using a short U-adjust followed by an F-trigger recovery.
cases.setup: F' U' F U R U R' U'

cases.name: F2L 27
cases.alg: R U' R' U R U' R'
cases.caseSetupAlg: R U R' U' R U R'
cases.note: Corner-in-slot case with a compact R/U extraction and reinsertion rhythm.
cases.setup: R U R' U' R U R'

cases.name: F2L 28
cases.alg: R U R' U' F R' F' R
cases.caseSetupAlg: R' F R F' U R U' R'
cases.note: Corner-in-slot case combining a U/R trigger and F-trigger to rebuild the pair.
cases.setup: R' F R F' U R U' R'

cases.name: F2L 29
cases.alg: R' F R F' U R U' R'
cases.caseSetupAlg: F R' F' R F R' F' R
cases.note: Corner-in-slot case with repeated F/R structure before a standard insert finish.
cases.setup: F R' F' R F R' F' R

cases.name: F2L 30
cases.alg: R U R' U' R U R'
cases.caseSetupAlg: R U' R' U R U' R'
cases.note: Corner-in-slot case using a repeated R/U rhythm to extract, pair and reinsert.
cases.setup: R U' R' U R U' R'

f2lCanonicalSections.title: Edge In Slot
f2lCanonicalSections.description: F2L cases where the edge piece is already sitting in the FR slot. The corner is free in the U layer. Strategy: disrupt the edge, pair it with the corner, and reinsert.

cases.name: F2L 31
cases.alg: R U' R' U2 R U' R'
cases.caseSetupAlg: R U R' U2 R U R'
cases.note: Edge correctly in slot, corner on U (case 1). U2 realignment sequence before clean pair insertion.
cases.setup: R U R' U2 R U R'

cases.name: F2L 32
cases.alg: U R U2 R' U' R U R'
cases.caseSetupAlg: R U' R' U R U2 R' U'
cases.note: Edge correctly in slot, corner on U (case 2). Pre-AUF into a U2 pair-and-insert sequence.
cases.setup: R U' R' U R U2 R' U'

cases.name: F2L 33
cases.alg: U' R U2 R' U R U' R'
cases.caseSetupAlg: R U R' U' R U2 R' U
cases.note: Edge correctly in slot, corner on U (case 3). U' pre-adjust, then U2 pivot before final insert.
cases.setup: R U R' U' R U2 R' U

cases.name: F2L 34
cases.alg: F' U F U R U' R'
cases.caseSetupAlg: R U R' U' F' U' F
cases.note: Edge flipped in slot, corner on U (case 1). F-trigger extracts the flipped edge, then standard R/U insert.
cases.setup: R U R' U' F' U' F

cases.name: F2L 35
cases.alg: F' U' F U2 R U' R'
cases.caseSetupAlg: R U R' U2 F' U F
cases.note: Edge flipped in slot, corner on U (case 2). F-trigger with U' and U2 realignment after extraction.
cases.setup: R U R' U2 F' U F

cases.name: F2L 36
cases.alg: R U' R' F' U2 F
cases.caseSetupAlg: F' U2 F R U R'
cases.note: Edge flipped in slot, corner on U (case 3). Compact R/U opener followed by F-trigger finish.
cases.setup: F' U2 F R U R'

f2lCanonicalSections.title: Both In Slot
f2lCanonicalSections.description: The final 5 canonical F2L cases: both the corner and edge are stuck in slot positions. These are the most complex recovery cases in the 41-case set and require multi-phase extraction.

cases.name: F2L 37
cases.alg: R U R' U' R U R' U' R U' R'
cases.caseSetupAlg: R U R' U R U' R' U R U' R'
cases.note: Both pieces in slot (case 1). Repeated R/U rhythm dislodges corner, pairs with edge, then reinserts.
cases.setup: R U R' U R U' R' U R U' R'

cases.name: F2L 38
cases.alg: R U' R' U2 R U R' U R U' R'
cases.caseSetupAlg: R U R' U' R U' R' U2 R U R'
cases.note: Both pieces in slot (case 2). U2 realignment mid-sequence before the pair locks in.
cases.setup: R U R' U' R U' R' U2 R U R'

cases.name: F2L 39
cases.alg: R U2 R' U' R U' R' U R U R'
cases.caseSetupAlg: R U' R' U R U R' U R U2 R'
cases.note: Both pieces in slot (case 3). U2 opener before a pair-then-insert with double U finish.
cases.setup: R U' R' U R U R' U R U2 R'

cases.name: F2L 40
cases.alg: R U' R' U R U' R' U2 R U R'
cases.caseSetupAlg: R U' R' U2 R U R' U' R U R'
cases.note: Both pieces in slot (case 4). Three-phase extraction: dislodge, U2-adjust, reinsert.
cases.setup: R U' R' U2 R U R' U' R U R'

cases.name: F2L 41
cases.alg: R U R' U' R U2 R' U' R U R'
cases.caseSetupAlg: R U' R' U R U2 R' U R U' R'
cases.note: Canonical case 41: the hardest both-in-slot scenario. The U2 pivot mid-sequence is the key recognition cue.
cases.setup: R U' R' U R U2 R' U R U' R'

f2lDrillSections.title: Free Pairs
f2lDrillSections.description: Both pieces are free and easy to pair. Great starting point for building intuitive F2L habits.

cases.name: Basic Pair Insert (Right Slot)
cases.alg: U R U' R'
cases.caseSetupAlg: U R U' R' U2
cases.note: Simple pair-and-insert trigger when the pair is already aligned for the right slot.

cases.name: Basic Pair Insert (Left Slot)
cases.alg: U' L' U L
cases.note: Mirror of the basic free-pair insert for the front-left slot.

cases.name: Sledge Setup Pair
cases.alg: R' F R F'
cases.note: Common pairing trigger used to connect and control pair orientation.

cases.name: Front Pair Lift
cases.alg: F' U F
cases.note: Useful to free or pair pieces while preserving solved slots.

cases.name: Keyhole Pair and Drop
cases.alg: R U R' U' R U R'
cases.note: Uses an open slot as a keyhole to pair pieces before insertion.
cases.setup: Keep one slot open for keyhole usage.

cases.name: Split Pair Preparation
cases.alg: U R U2 R' U' R U R'
cases.note: Separates awkward free pieces into a cleaner pairing angle.

f2lDrillSections.title: Connected Pairs
f2lDrillSections.description: Corner and edge are already paired. Focus on recognizing slot and inserting with minimal rotations.

cases.name: Connected Pair Insert (Right)
cases.alg: R U' R'
cases.caseSetupAlg: y U R U' R'
cases.note: Direct insert for a connected pair targeting the front-right slot.

cases.name: Connected Pair Insert (Left)
cases.alg: L' U L
cases.note: Mirror insert for front-left slot.

cases.name: U-Adjust + Insert
cases.alg: U R U' R'
cases.note: Use a U turn first when the pair is connected but misaligned with its target slot.

cases.name: U'-Adjust + Left Insert
cases.alg: U' L' U L
cases.note: Mirror adjustment for a connected pair aiming at the left slot.

cases.name: Back Slot to Front Insert
cases.alg: U2 R U' R'
cases.note: Rotate the pair over the front-right slot without cube rotation.

cases.name: Connected Pair with Keyhole Finish
cases.alg: R U' R' U R U' R'
cases.note: Useful when a direct insert would disturb another pair.
cases.setup: Preserve adjacent solved slot by using a short keyhole path.

f2lDrillSections.title: Disconnected Pairs
f2lDrillSections.description: Corner and edge are separated. The key skill is pairing them while preserving existing slots.

cases.name: Pair Then Insert (Right)
cases.alg: U R U' R' U' F' U F
cases.caseSetupAlg: R U R' U' y R U' R'
cases.note: Classic pairing sequence followed by insertion into the right slot.

cases.name: Pair Then Insert (Left)
cases.alg: U' L' U L U F U' F'
cases.note: Mirror concept for the left side.

cases.name: Pair with Sledge Influence
cases.alg: R U R' U' R' F R F'
cases.note: Pairs pieces while controlling orientation of the pair.

cases.name: Pair with Sexy Trigger
cases.alg: R U R' U' U' R U R'
cases.note: Uses a SEXY-style rhythm to build a cleaner insert angle.

cases.name: Back Pairing to Left Slot
cases.alg: U L' U' L U' L' U L
cases.note: Pairs on top then inserts on the left without cube rotation.

f2lDrillSections.title: Corner In Slot
f2lDrillSections.description: Corner is trapped in a slot while the edge is out. First extract efficiently, then pair and insert.

cases.name: Corner Extraction (Right)
cases.alg: R U R' U' R U R'
cases.caseSetupAlg: R U2 R' y U R U' R'
cases.note: Takes the corner out while keeping control of the edge for a follow-up insert.

cases.name: Corner Extraction (Left)
cases.alg: L' U' L U L' U' L
cases.note: Mirror extraction for left slots.

cases.name: Corner Pop + Pair (Right)
cases.alg: R U2 R' U' R U R'
cases.note: Pops the corner to U-layer and immediately begins pairing.

cases.name: Keyhole Corner Rescue
cases.alg: R U' R' U R U R'
cases.note: Alternative rescue path when standard extraction conflicts with another slot.

f2lDrillSections.title: Edge In Slot
f2lDrillSections.description: Edge is stuck in a slot while the corner is free. Use extraction patterns that preserve solved pairs.

cases.name: Edge Extraction + Pair
cases.alg: R U' R' U F' U F
cases.caseSetupAlg: y' U R U' R' U2
cases.note: Pulls out the edge and transitions into a pairing sequence.

cases.name: Mirror Edge Extraction
cases.alg: L' U L U' F U' F'
cases.note: Mirror logic for left slots.

cases.name: Edge Pop with Sledge Follow-up
cases.alg: R U R' U' R' F R F'
cases.note: Extracts and repairs with a sledge-style trigger.

cases.name: Rotationless Edge Rescue
cases.alg: U R U' R' U' F' U F
cases.note: Rescue pattern for an edge trapped in slot while preserving flow on top.

f2lDrillSections.title: Pieces In Slot
f2lDrillSections.description: Both F2L pieces are in slots (often incorrect). These are recovery cases before standard pairing.

cases.name: Extract Both (Right Recovery)
cases.alg: R U R' U' R U R'
cases.note: Recovery sequence to free pieces and transition back into normal F2L flow.

cases.name: Extract Both (Left Recovery)
cases.alg: L' U' L U L' U' L
cases.note: Mirror recovery for left-side slots.

cases.name: Double Slot Break (Right Bias)
cases.alg: R U' R' U R U2 R'
cases.note: Breaks an awkward in-slot pair and repositions pieces to the U-layer.

cases.name: Protected Recovery with Front Lift
cases.alg: F' U F U R U' R'
cases.note: Recovery route that protects adjacent solved pieces while freeing the target pair.
cases.setup: Useful when one neighboring slot is already solved.
